message:
fix: remove stale render_context module re-export from ftui-render

The render_context module file was previously deleted but its pub mod
declaration in lib.rs was not cleaned up, causing a compilation error
(module not found). This removes the dangling re-export so the crate
compiles cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
